tools.name: apollo_to_salesforce_lead
tools.description: Maps an Apollo contact payload to a Salesforce Lead object. Accepts the full Apollo CSV export column set. Strict-fail if FirstName, LastName, or Phone cannot be resolved. All other Salesforce fields are populated when source data is present, silently omitted otherwise. Returns a Deterministic Recei

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "apollo_to_salesforce_lead" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.
